pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagecontent.Ba.Docs: The background color for an in-app message banner, expressed as a hex color code (such as #000000 for black).

pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagecontent.Bo.Docs: Specifies the configuration of main body text in an in-app message template.

pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagecontent.He.Docs: Specifies the configuration and content of the header or title text of the in-app message.

pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagecontent.Im.Docs: The URL of the image that appears on an in-app message banner.

pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagecontent.Pr.Docs: An object that contains configuration information about the primary button in an in-app message.

pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagecontent.Se.Docs: An object that contains configuration information about the secondary button in an in-app message.
